pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Exclude the legacy JUnit 4 dependency from mockwebserver to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
Bump the maven-checkstyle-plugin version to a newer snapshot.

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/RecipeGenera.general_idea: Replace deprecated java.nio.file.Paths.get() with the modern Path.of() factory method introduced in Java 11.

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Gemi.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern Java API usage.
Remove unused import for the deprecated Paths class.

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for more concise string interpolation.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.before: String.format("Detected allergen token '%s' in recipe", token)

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Use pattern matching for instanceof to eliminate explicit casting.
Migrate instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner type casting.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.before: if (etm instanceof Number) { int est = ((Number) etm).intValue();
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after: if (etm instanceof Number number) { int est = number.intValue();

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.before: violations.add(String.format("Estimated total time %d minutes exceeds maximum allowed %d minutes", est, maxTotalMinutes));
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after: violations.add("Estimated total time %d minutes exceeds maximum allowed %d minutes".formatted(est, maxTotalMinutes));

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Replace Paths.get with Path.of for creating Path instances.
Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst for accessing the first element.
Add import for java.nio.file.Path to support the new Path.of usage.

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.general_idea: Replace manual casting after instanceof check with pattern matching to simplify code.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.before: if (etm instanceof Number) { int est = ((Number) etm).intValue();
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.after: if (etm instanceof Number number) { int est = number.intValue();

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.before: violations.add(String.format("Estimated total time %d minutes exceeds maximum allowed %d minutes", est, maxTotalMinutes));
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.after: violations.add("Estimated total time %d minutes exceeds maximum allowed %d minutes".formatted(est, maxTotalMinutes));

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.general_idea: Replace manual casting after instanceof check with pattern matching to simplify code.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.before: if (pt instanceof String) { Integer parsed = parseMinutesFromString((String) pt);
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.after: if (pt instanceof String string) { Integer parsed = parseMinutesFromString(string);

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.before: violations.add(String.format("Parsed prepTime %d minutes exceeds maximum allowed %d minutes", parsed, maxTotalMinutes));
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.after: violations.add("Parsed prepTime %d minutes exceeds maximum allowed %d minutes".formatted(parsed, maxTotalMinutes));

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.general_idea: Replace manual casting after instanceof check with pattern matching to simplify code.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.after: if (v instanceof Number number) return number.intValue();

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.general_idea: Replace manual casting after instanceof check with pattern matching to simplify code.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.before: if (v instanceof String) return parseMinutesFromString((String) v);
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/util/TimePar.after: if (v instanceof String string) return parseMinutesFromString(string);

src/test/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for cleaner code.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for cleaner code.
